crosswalk_note: Whole-plant modeled failed-stow loss ($380k/MW=33.9% TIV). Exceeds the tracker+racking mounting bucket ($122,892/MWdc) alone, so it necessarily includes module-attach and downtime; HAIL-stow framed, not isolated straight-line wind. Not directly comparable to a single-FU DR.
Fixed-tilt modeled loss ($340k/MW=30.4% TIV). Architecture-appropriate (racking not tracker) but still blended module+mounting+BI and hail/NatCat-mixed. Order-of-magnitude only.
Successful-hail-stow residual ($150k/MW=13.4% TIV). Predominantly a hail-mitigation residual, NOT straight-line wind; included to show the stow-behavior swing only.
Hardening COST (+$50k/MW), hail-glass upgrade. Value-at-risk context, not a DR.
Cross-check of the installed-TIV basis; EXACT match ($1.12/W-dc). Anchors every % normalization; not a loss.
Physical-replaceable denominator (78.37% of TIV) against which all FU value shares are measured; not a loss.
$342M gross claim with NO MW denominator -> $/MW WITHHELD per golden rule; blended NatCat.

reported_value: array liftoff; ~140 mph vs ASCE 120 mph design
crosswalk_note: Clean derecho failure at ~140 mph vs 120 mph design (R_eff>1) -> qualitatively consistent with DR rising past R0 for foundation/module-attach. No $ -> not normalizable.
Failure BELOW design (~70 mph) -> workmanship/anchorage defect, NOT the design-demand curve. Excluded from curve comparison.
~1-2% tracker collapse fraction (perimeter). A count fraction, not a $ DR; informs SWS_TRACKER_STRUCT partial-loss shape only.
~2,000 modules at a 55 MW plant (small % of modules). Module-attach fraction, non-US, no gust; shape context only.
25-yr cumulative failure PROBABILITY by stow (1.7-14.6%), not single-event DR and not $. Screening only.
Derived $/MW span up to $1.5M/MW (134% TIV) -> repair+debris+replace can exceed asset TIV; GRAIN WARNING, not DR>1. $ WITHHELD.
